lastReleaseMessage: Admin-configurable shift options and a full visual polish...

barRaise.topFinding: Fifth consecutive bar-raise, fifth identical action list, and the verdict steps back down from at-risk to stalled. The 05-30 relaxation to at-risk rested on one fresh commit (b41b853, 2026-05-29) proving the tree was no longer frozen; that commit is now two days old, predates the 05-30 report, touched none of the five carried actions, and there has been zero movement in the 24h since (git log --since=2026-05-30 is empty, dirty tree byte-stable). The verdict-picker stalled clause (prior at-risk, nothing changed since) fires. All five carried findings re-verified and hold: Discord webhook still tracked and ungitignored, write-dashboard-status.ps1:82-84 still hardcodes M2, :98-99 still nulls barRaise, DESIGN.md:8 still v0.2.0, DESIGN.md:196 still claims a nonexistent preference_log table. Audit-loop integrity escalated to HIGH. Product is healthy; the process is not. One v0.3.1 patch bundling the dirty tree with five one-line fixes clears the board.
